assertion.statement: The series committed to by sha256 e633976af5f42f91f39883bb74b512882fb5085bda63457c034999693ccda218 records the IndexPlus live portfolio from 2026-04-28 (baseline) through 2026-07-17: portfolio +1.2186%, NIFTY 50 price index +1.3749% over the same dates — the portfolio TRAILS the benchmark by 15.63 bps as of sealing. Basis disclosures: the benchmark is the price index (excludes dividends; total-return would widen the gap), and its values are the last traded prints of each session, not official NSE closes. Sealed now so that no later telling of this record can improve on what the data said today.

body.rationale: First real entry: a live track-record snapshot, sealed including its current underperformance. Exhibit: https://anvil.yourarmor.ai/exhibits/e633976af5f42f91.json

criterion.hit_if: At horizon: (1) the exhibit fetched from exhibit_url hashes to exhibit_sha256; (2) its portfolio/benchmark arrays reproduce the asserted portfolio_return_pct, benchmark_return_pct and gap_bps exactly; (3) every benchmark value (a last print, per oracle.benchmark_basis) sits within benchmark_tolerance_pct of the official NIFTY 50 close for its date.
criterion.miss_if: Exhibit unavailable at exhibit_url, or sha256 differs, or any asserted number fails recomputation, or any exhibit benchmark close deviates from the official close beyond tolerance. Unavailability of OUR OWN exhibit is a MISS, not a void.
criterion.void_if: No independent record of official NIFTY 50 closes is retrievable during the grading window.

oracle.benchmark_basis: last traded print of each session (NOT official NSE close)
oracle.benchmark_official_source: NSE official closing values for NIFTY 50 (niftyindices.com historical data, or any independent record of official closes; api.ental.ai may be used only as a cross-check)
oracle.tolerance_purpose: anti-fabrication bound, not a precision test: last-print vs official-close noise is a few bps; values invented after the fact would not track official closes this closely

witness.note: RFC 3161 tokens over checkpoint bytes; raw tokens mirrored under /witness/. Full chain: openssl ts -verify -data <checkpoint> -in <token.tsr> -CAfile <cacert.pem> (freetsa additionally: -untrusted tsa.crt); exact cert URLs in tsa_certs. Append-only: first_by_tree_size lists the earliest witnessed checkpoint at each past size.
